sample.title: Reggaeton Warehouse (21+)
lineup: Every hour shifts into a different side of reggaeton.

From MEXA, All-Girls, and La Nueva, to Throwbacks and Bad Bunny, then into Dembow, Reggaeton Colombiano, Perreo, Marroneo, Reggaeton Hits, Latin EDM, and Romantiqueo — the whole night is built like a ride through the culture, one sound at a time.
360 Stage. Low light. Heavy bass. Real crowd. No mainstream formula. No VIP nonsense. Just a packed warehouse moving through the many worlds of reggaeton from open to close.
It’s hour by hour, mood by mood, genre by genre.
If you know, you know. If not, this is your entry point.

All tickets are non-refundable and non-exchangeable. Event cancellations without a rescheduled date will result in an automatic full refund to the original credit card used for the purchase. Your purchase of a ticket implies agreement with this policy. Please verify event details before buying tickets.
By attending this event, you grant reggaetonLABS permission to photograph and record you, and to use your image for promotional purposes.
Please ensure you bring a government-issued ID with your date of birth.**
